/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,cv_engine.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o cv_engine.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/cv_engine.dir/lesson1.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ptcloud.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stereo.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_geometry.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.5.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.5.1.0
